items.titleZh: [已更新 3/25] 计划小规模补丁 - 2026年3月26日
items.body:
MAINTENANCE
2026年3月25日
[UPDATED 3/25] SCHEDULED MINOR PATCH - MARCH 26, 2026

We will be performing a scheduled minor patch maintenance starting on Thursday, March 26, 2026 at 5:00 AM PDT (8:00 AM EDT / 1:00 PM CET / 11:00 PM AEDT). We anticipate the maintenance to last approximately 6 hours, concluding around 11:00 AM PDT (2:00 PM EDT / 7:00 PM CET / 5:00 AM AEDT March 27).

Times:

Thursday, March 26, 2026
PDT (UTC -7): 5:00 AM - 11:00 AM
EDT (UTC -4): 8:00 AM - 2:00 PM
CET (UTC +1): 1:00 PM - 7:00 PM
AEDT (UTC +11): 11:00 PM - 5:00 AM March 27

What will be unavailable:

All MapleStory game servers.

Changes and Updates:

MapleStory will be updated to v.267.3.0.
Added Plasma Heart to the Meso Shop in the Monster Park Mayhem event.
[Updated 3/25] Resolved an issue where Magician's Arcane Overdrive skill tooltip incorrectly displayed as 'Damage' and not 'Final Damage'.
[Updated 3/25] Resolved an issue where the following Sia Astelle skills could be activated when using Sol Janus:
Antares
Pole
Starlight
[Updated 3/25] Resolved an issue with Sia Astelle's Enhanced Pole skill.
Resolved an issue where the Black Heart obtained from the Philosopher's Book was incorrectly set as a permanent item instead of having a 30-day duration.
Any permanent Black Heart items that have been distributed will be adjusted to the intended 30-day duration.
Resolved an issue where the Tinkerer's Chest event quest did not appear after receiving the item from the Marvel Machine.
Resolved an issue where the Party HP UI did not display party member participation indicators during boss fights in Heroic Worlds.
Resolved an issue where Luminous' Liberation Orb skill was attacking slower than intended.
Resolved an issue where Paladin's Mighty Mjolnir's skill effects were shown incorrectly.
Resolved an issue where Wild Hunter's HEXA Another Bite and HEXA Final Attack skills were not benefitting from the Another Bite and Final Attack Boost Nodes.
Resolved an issue where unclaimed reward notifications for the concluded Twilight Eve event would appear when exiting the game.
Resolved an issue where the item description for the Goddess's Special Lv. 225 Gift in the Goddess's Blessing Pass event was displayed incorrectly.
Resolved an issue where the Firestarter skill from the Firestarter Ring was able to be added in the Buff Favorites UI.
Resolved an issue where the Chaotic Pitched Accessory Box obtained from Mystic Frontier was not appearing in the player's inventory. 
Chaotic Pitched Accessory Boxes will be distributed in a future maintenance.
Resolved an issue where some deleted skills could be crafted.
Resolved an issue with the 'Favorites' button function in the Event List UI.
Resolved an issue with The First Adversary boss' clone skill where it was not functioning as intended.
Resolved an issue when a Sia Astelle character attempts to leave Oort before completing the 'Fallen Stars' quest the guide message displays an incorrect quest to complete.
Resolved an issue where some Cash Shop tabs were not leading to the correct page when clicked.
Resolved an issue where the Maple Inc. ID Badge effect was not properly displayed for the Associate Executive Rank.
Resolved an issue where players were unable to claim rewards with the Reward Distribution feature despite dealing enough damage to the boss.
Resolved an issue where Tera Burning was unable to be applied to Zero characters during character creation.
items.bodyZh: 维护公告 2026年3月25日 [更新于3月25日] 计划性小型补丁维护 - 2026年3月26日 我们将于2026年3月26日，星期四，凌晨5:00 PDT (北京时间 2026年3月26日 20:00) 开始进行一次计划性小型补丁维护。预计维护将持续约6小时，于上午11:00 PDT (北京时间 2026年3月27日 2:00) 左右结束。 维护时间详情： 2026年3月26日，星期四 * 北京时间 (UTC +8): 3月26日 20:00 - 3月27日 2:00 * 太平洋夏令时 (UTC -7): 凌晨5:00 - 上午11:00 * 东部夏令时 (UTC -4): 上午8:00 - 下午2:00 * 欧洲中部时间 (UTC +1): 下午1:00 - 晚上7:00 * 澳大利亚东部夏令时 (UTC +11): 晚上11:00 - 3月27日凌晨5:00 维护期间将无法访问： 所有《冒险岛》游戏服务器。 变更与更新内容： 《冒险岛》将更新至版本 v.267.3.0。 在怪物公园大乱斗活动的枫币商店中新增了等离子之心。 [更新于3月25日] 修复了魔法师职业的"奥秘超载"技能提示信息中错误显示为"伤害"而非"最终伤害"的问题。 [更新于3月25日] 修复了在使用索尔·杰纳斯时，以下希娅·阿斯特勒技能仍可被激活的问题： 安塔瑞斯 极星 星光 [更新于3月25日] 修复了希娅·阿斯特勒的"强化极星"技能存在的问题。 修复了从"哲学家的书"中获得的黑色之心被错误设置为永久物品，而非30天有效期的问题。 已分发的任何永久黑色之心物品将被调整为预期的30天有效期。 修复了从神奇机器获得物品后，"工匠的宝箱"活动任务未出现的问题。 修复了在英雄世界中进行首领战时，队伍生命值UI未显示队员参与指示器的问题。 修复了夜光法师的"解放宝珠"技能攻击速度低于预期的问题。 修复了圣骑士的"强力雷神之锤"技能效果显示不正确的问题。 修复了狂豹猎人的六核"再次撕咬"和六核"最终攻击"技能未从"再次撕咬"和"最终攻击"强化核心中获得加成的问题。 修复了退出游戏时，会显示已结束的"暮光前夕"活动的未领取奖励通知的问题。 修复了"女神的祝福通行证"活动中，女神特别225级礼物的物品描述显示不正确的问题。 修复了"点火者戒指"的"点火者"技能可被添加到增益收藏UI中的问题。 修复了从神秘边境获得的混沌深渊饰品盒未出现在玩家背包中的问题。 混沌深渊饰品盒将在未来的维护中发放。 修复了部分已删除技能仍可被制作的问题。 修复了活动列表UI中"收藏"按钮功能的问题。 修复了"最初的敌对者"首领的分身技能未按预期运作的问题。 修复了希娅·阿斯特勒角色在完成"陨落的星辰"任务前试图离开奥尔特时，引导信息显示错误需完成任务的问题。 修复了点击部分商城标签页时未跳转到正确页面的问题。 修复了枫叶公司员工证效果未为"协理"等级正确显示的问题。 修复了玩家在对首领造成足够伤害后，仍无法通过奖励发放功能领取奖励的问题。 修复了在角色创建期间无法对神之子角色应用极限燃烧的问题。

items.title: maintenanceMar 19, 2026V.267 Known IssuesHere you’ll find a list of known and resolved issues from the v.267 - MapleStory x One-Punch Man update.
items.body:
MAINTENANCE
2026年3月19日
V.267 KNOWN ISSUES

The Known Issues section focuses on the major issues that have significantly impacted the game and community, and which our team is actively addressing. Please note that while we aim to cover the most impactful issues, this list will not encompass every reported issue. Check back regularly for updates on the status of these issues and information on resolved issues, or any new issues that may have been added.

Here you’ll find a list of known and resolved issues from the v.267 - MapleStory x One-Punch Man update:

KNOWN ISSUES
General
Yulia NPC is missing from major towns (Henesys, Nameless Town, Cernium Square, etc).
The Black Heart obtained from the Philosopher's Book is incorrectly set as a permanent item instead of having a 30-day duration. This issue will be fixed in the next maintenance and any permanent Black Heart items that have been distributed will be adjusted to the intended 30-day duration.
Magician's Arcane Overdrive skill tooltip is incorrectly shown as 'Damage' and not 'Final Damage'.
Party HP UI does not display party member participation indicators during boss fights in Heroic Worlds.
'Favorites' button function in the Event List UI sometimes does not work correctly.
Paladin's Mighty Mjolnir's skill effects are shown incorrectly.
When a Sia Astelle character attempts to leave Oort before completing the 'Fallen Stars' quest the guide message displays an incorrect quest to complete.
The item description for the Goddess's Special Lv. 225 Gift in the Goddess Pass is incorrectly shown.
The related quest to use the Tinkerer's Chest does not appear after receiving it from the Marvel Machine.
RESOLVED ISSUES
March 20, 2026
Resolved an issue where the Check-in count for the '[Redux Event] Savage' event was displayed incorrectly.
March 19, 2026
Resolved an issue where players were unable to claim mesos from the Meso Market. For affected players, you can now claim Mesos via the Gift Drop and the Meso Market has been reenabled.
Resolved an issue where Lara's Winding Mountain Ridge could not be resummoned.
Resolved an issue where certain bosses in Heroic Worlds dropped Eternal Fragments due to unintended specifications.
Resolved an issue where certain bosses were dropping incorrect items.
Resolved an issue where Luminous' Liberation Orb was not stacking as intended.
Resolved an issue where dismissing a system message would sometimes cause a softlock.
Resolved an issue where non Sia Astelle job weapons were dropping from Zakum and Hilla in Heroic Worlds.
Resolved an issue where the '[Weekly Quest] Erda's Request' quest did not reset. The quest will reset today at 12:00 AM UTC and will resume its normal weekly reset on Thursday at 12:00 AM UTC.
Resolved an issue where after purchasing a Premium Pass, rewards from the Goddess's Blessing Pass could sometimes not be claimed.
Resolved an issue where Sia Astelle's 5th Job enhancements were not applying to her 6th Job skills.
March 18, 2026
Resolved an issue where certain skill effects from the New Leaf Mall Food Court event were not applying.
items.bodyZh: **维护公告** 2026年3月19日 V.267 已知问题 “已知问题”部分主要关注对游戏和社区造成重大影响，且我们团队正在积极处理的主要问题。请注意，虽然我们力求涵盖影响最大的问题，但此列表不会包含所有已报告的问题。请定期查看此处，以获取这些问题状态的更新、已解决问题的信息，或可能新增的问题。 以下是 v.267 - 《冒险岛》x《一拳超人》更新中的已知问题与已解决问题列表： **已知问题** **通用** * 主要城镇（如射手村、无名村、赛尔尼姆广场等）中缺失尤莉亚 NPC。 * 从“哲学家的书”中获得的黑色心形道具被错误地设置为永久物品，而非30天期限。此问题将在下次维护中修复，已分发的永久黑色心形道具将被调整为原定的30天期限。 * 魔法师的“奥秘超载”技能描述中错误地显示为“伤害”而非“最终伤害”。 * 在英雄世界中进行首领战时，队伍HP界面不显示队员参与指示器。 * 事件列表UI中的“收藏”按钮功能有时无法正常工作。 * 圣骑士的“强力雷神之锤”技能效果显示不正确。 * 当西亚·阿斯特尔角色在完成“坠落的星辰”任务前尝试离开奥尔特时，引导信息会显示错误的需要完成的任务。 * 女神通行证中“女神的特别225级礼物”的物品描述显示不正确。 * 从神奇机器获得“工匠的宝箱”后，未出现相关的使用任务。 **已解决问题** **2026年3月20日** * 修复了“[重演活动] 野蛮”活动的签到计数显示不正确的问题。 **2026年3月19日** * 修复了玩家无法从金币市场领取金币的问题。受影响的玩家现在可以通过礼物箱领取金币，且金币市场已重新启用。 * 修复了唤灵斗师的“盘绕山脊”无法重新召唤的问题。 * 修复了英雄世界中某些首领因非预期设定掉落永恒碎片的问题。 * 修复了某些首领掉落错误物品的问题。 * 修复了夜光法师的“解放宝珠”未按预期叠加的问题。 * 修复了关闭系统消息有时会导致游戏软锁定的问题。 * 修复了英雄世界中扎昆和希拉掉落非西亚·阿斯特尔职业武器的问题。 * 修复了“[每周任务] 艾尔达的请求”任务未重置的问题。该任务将于今日 北京时间 2026年3月20日 8:00 重置，并将恢复于每周四 北京时间 2026年3月27日 8:00 的正常每周重置。 * 修复了购买高级通行证后，有时无法领取女神祝福通行证奖励的问题。 * 修复了西亚·阿斯特尔的5转强化未应用于其6转技能的问题。 **2026年3月18日** * 修复了新叶商城美食广场活动的某些技能效果未生效的问题。

items.title: maintenanceMar 19, 2026[Completed] Unscheduled Channel Maintenance and Live Minor Patch - March 19, 2026The maintenance has been completed please restart your client to ensure you receive the update.
items.titleZh: [已完成] 非计划频道维护与实时小补丁 - 2026年3月19日
items.body:
MAINTENANCE
2026年3月19日
[COMPLETED] UNSCHEDULED CHANNEL MAINTENANCE AND LIVE MINOR PATCH - MARCH 19, 2026

[Updated March 19 at 3:18 PM PDT] The maintenance has been completed please restart your client to ensure you receive the update.

Changes and Updates:

Resolved an issue where players were unable to claim mesos from the Meso Market.
For affected players, you can now claim Mesos via the Gift Drop and the Meso Market has been reenabled.
Resolved an issue where Lara's Winding Mountain Ridge could not be resummoned.
Resolved an issue where certain bosses in Heroic Worlds dropped Eternal Fragments due to unintended specifications.
Resolved an issue where certain bosses were dropping incorrect items.
Resolved an issue where Luminous' Liberation Orb was not stacking as intended.
Resolved an issue where dismissing a system message would sometimes cause a softlock.
Resolved an issue where non Sia Astelle job weapons were dropping from Zakum and Hilla in Heroic Worlds.
Resolved an issue where the '[Weekly Quest] Erda's Request' quest did not reset.
The quest will reset today at 12:00 AM UTC and will resume its normal weekly reset on Thursday at 12:00 AM UTC.
Resolved an issue where after purchasing a Premium Pass, rewards from the Goddess's Blessing Pass could sometimes not be claimed.
Resolved an issue where Sia Astelle's 5th Job enhancements were not applying to her 6th Job skills.

We will be performing an unscheduled channel maintenance and live minor patch today, March 19, 2026 at 1:00 PM PDT (4:00 PM EDT / 9:00 PM CET / 7:00 AM AEDT March 20). We anticipate the maintenance to last approximately 3 hours, concluding around 3:00 PM March 19 PDT (6:00 PM EDT / 11:00 PM CET / 9:00 AM AEDT March 20).

Times:

Thursday, March 19, 2026
PDT (UTC -7): 1:00 PM - 3:00 PM
EDT (UTC -4): 4:00 PM - 6:00 PM
CET (UTC +1): 9:00 PM - 11:00 PM
AEDT (UTC +11): 7:00 AM March 20 - 9:00 AM March 20


What will be unavailable:

Group A

Channels 1-5, 11-15 on Luna and Solis
Channel 1-15 on Scania, Bera, and Hyperion
Channel 1-10 on NA Challenger World-Interactive
Channels 1-20 on Kronos
Channels 1-30 NA Challenger World-Heroic
Channel 1-5 on EU Challenger World-Interactive and EU Challenger World-Heroic
Channels 1-30 NA One-Punch Man Special World
Channels 1-5 EU One-Punch Man Special World
Cross World Party Quest
Group B

Please allow some time when moving between channels.
Channels 6-10, 16-20 on Luna and Solis
Channels 16-30 on Scania, Bera, and Hyperion
Channels 11-20 on NA Challenger World-Interactive
Channels 21-40 on Kronos
Channels 31-60 NA Challenger World-Heroic
Channel 6-10 on EU Challenger World-Interactive and EU Challenger World-Heroic
Channels 31-60 NA One-Punch Man Special World
Channels 6-10 EU One-Punch Man Special World

Please restart your client once maintenance has been completed to ensure you receive the latest update.

This post will be updated with the list of issues resolved after the maintenance has been completed.
items.bodyZh: **维护** 2026年3月19日 **[已完成] 临时频道维护与在线小补丁 - 2026年3月19日** [更新于太平洋夏令时 3月19日下午3:18 (北京时间 2026年3月20日 6:18)] 维护已完成，请重启客户端以确保收到更新。 **变更与更新：** * 修复了玩家无法从金币市场领取金币的问题。 * 受影响的玩家现在可以通过礼物箱领取金币，金币市场已重新启用。 * 修复了神炮王（拉拉）的"蜿蜒山脊"无法重新召唤的问题。 * 修复了英雄世界（Heroic Worlds）中部分首领因非预期设定掉落永恒碎片的问题。 * 修复了部分首领掉落错误物品的问题。 * 修复了夜光法师的"解放宝珠"未按预期叠加的问题。 * 修复了关闭系统消息时偶尔导致软锁定的问题。 * 修复了英雄世界（Heroic Worlds）中，扎昆和希拉掉落非"希娅·阿斯特尔"职业武器的问题。 * 修复了"[每周任务] 艾尔达的请求"任务未重置的问题。 * 该任务将于今日世界标准时间（UTC）凌晨12:00重置，并将于周四世界标准时间（UTC）凌晨12:00恢复正常每周重置。 * 修复了购买高级通行证后，有时无法领取女神祝福通行证奖励的问题。 * 修复了希娅·阿斯特尔的5转强化未对其6转技能生效的问题。 我们将于今天，即**2026年3月19日太平洋夏令时下午1:00（东部夏令时下午4:00 / 中欧时间晚上9:00 / 澳大利亚东部夏令时 3月20日上午7:00）** 进行一次临时频道维护与在线小补丁。预计维护将持续约3小时，于**太平洋夏令时 3月19日下午3:00左右（东部夏令时下午6:00 / 中欧时间晚上11:00 / 澳大利亚东部夏令时 3月20日上午9:00）** 结束。 **维护时间详情：** 2026年3月19日，星期四 * 北京时间 (UTC +8): 3月20日 凌晨4:00 - 上午6:00 * 太平洋夏令时 (UTC -7): 下午1:00 - 下午3:00 * 东部夏令时 (UTC -4): 下午4:00 - 下午6:00 * 中欧时间 (UTC +1): 晚上9:00 - 晚上11:00 * 澳大利亚东部夏令时 (UTC +11): 3月20日 上午7:00 - 上午9:00 **将受影响的内容：** **A组** * Luna 和 Solis 的 1-5、11-15 频道 * Scania、Bera 和 Hyperion 的 1-15 频道 * NA Challenger World-Interactive 的 1-10 频道 * Kronos 的 1-20 频道 * NA Challenger World-Heroic 的 1-30 频道 * EU Challenger World-Interactive 和 EU Challenger World-Heroic 的 1-5 频道 * NA One-Punch Man Special World 的 1-30 频道 * EU One-Punch Man Special World 的 1-5 频道 * 跨世界组队任务 **B组** * 在频道间移动时，请预留一些时间。 * Luna 和 Solis 的 6-10、16-20 频道 * Scania、Bera 和 Hyperion 的 16-30 频道 * NA Challenger World-Interactive 的 11-20 频道 * Kronos 的 21-40 频道 * NA Challenger World-Heroic 的 31-60 频道 * EU Challenger World-Interactive 和 EU Challenger World-Heroic 的 6-10 频道 * NA One-Punch Man Special World 的 31-60 频道 * EU One-Punch Man Special World 的 6-10 频道 维护完成后，请重启您的客户端以确保收到最新更新。 维护完成后，本帖将更新已修复问题的列表。

items.title: maintenanceMar 16, 2026[Completed] Scheduled Game Update - March 18, 2026The maintenance has been completed and we have extended Cash Shop items in your inventory for 10 hours. Please restart your Nex
items.titleZh: [已完成] 计划游戏更新 - 2026年3月18日
items.body:
MAINTENANCE
2026年3月17日
[COMPLETED] SCHEDULED GAME UPDATE - MARCH 18, 2026

[Updated March 18 at 2:15 PM PDT] The maintenance has been completed and we have extended Cash Shop items in your inventory for 10 hours. Please restart your Nexon Launcher or Steam to ensure you receive the latest client update.

[Updated 2:00 PM PST] We will be extending maintenance until further notice. We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience this may have caused and will share another update as soon as we can. Thank you for your patience!

We will be performing a scheduled game update starting on Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 5:00 AM PDT (8:00 AM EDT / 1:00 PM CET / 11:00 PM AEDT). We anticipate the maintenance to conclude around 2:00 PM PDT (5:00 PM EDT / 10:00 PM CET / 8:00 AM AEDT March 19). 

Please note that the estimated length of time for each maintenance is subject to change without notification.

Thanks for your patience!

Times:

Wednesday, March 18, 2026
PDT (UTC -7): 5:00 AM - 2:00 PM
EDT (UTC -4): 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM
CET (UTC +1): 1:00 PM - 10:00 PM 
AEDT (UTC +11): 11:00 PM - 8:00 AM March 19

What will be unavailable:

All MapleStory game servers.

Changes and Updates:

MapleStory will be updated to v.267.1.1.
Patch Notes can be found here!
items.bodyZh: **维护** 2026年3月17日 **[已完成] 计划游戏更新 - 2026年3月18日** [更新于 北京时间 2026年3月18日 17:15] 维护已完成，我们已将您背包中的商城物品有效期延长了10小时。请重启 Nexon Launcher 或 Steam 以确保获取最新的客户端更新。 [更新于 北京时间 2026年3月18日 17:00] 我们将延长维护时间，直至另行通知。对于可能造成的不便，我们深表歉意，并将在可能时尽快分享下一次更新。感谢您的耐心等待！ 我们将于 **2026年3月18日，星期三** 进行一次计划游戏更新，开始时间为 **太平洋夏令时 (UTC -7) 凌晨5:00 (北京时间 2026年3月18日 20:00)**。预计维护结束时间约为 **太平洋夏令时 (UTC -7) 下午2:00 (北京时间 2026年3月19日 5:00)**。 请注意，每次维护的预计时长可能未经通知而变更。 感谢您的耐心！ **维护时间详情：** 2026年3月18日，星期三 * 北京时间 (UTC +8): 3月18日 20:00 - 3月19日 5:00 * 太平洋夏令时 (UTC -7): 凌晨5:00 - 下午2:00 * 东部夏令时 (UTC -4): 上午8:00 - 下午5:00 * 欧洲中部时间 (UTC +1): 下午1:00 - 晚上10:00 * 澳大利亚东部夏令时 (UTC +11): 晚上11:00 - 3月19日上午8:00 **影响范围：** 所有 MapleStory 游戏服务器。 **更新内容：** MapleStory 将更新至 **v.267.1.1** 版本。 更新说明可在此处查看！

items.title: maintenanceFeb 26, 2026V.266 Known IssuesHere you’ll find a list of known and resolved issues from the v.266 - The Sengoku Warrior Reawakening update.Feb 26, 2026Read More
items.body:
MAINTENANCE
2026年2月26日
V.266 KNOWN ISSUES

The Known Issues section focuses on the major issues that have significantly impacted the game and community, and which our team is actively addressing. Please note that while we aim to cover the most impactful issues, this list will not encompass every reported issue. Check back regularly for updates on the status of these issues and information on resolved issues, or any new issues that may have been added.

Here you’ll find a list of known and resolved issues from the v.266 - The Sengoku Warrior Reawakening update:

KNOWN ISSUES
[Updated 2/21] Unicube sales for Interactive worlds have been temporarily disabled. We apologize for the inconvenience.
[Updated 2/21] We confirmed Unicube is functioning as intended and the Unicube sales in Interactive Worlds have now been enabled. We apologize again for the inconvenience, and thank you for your patience.
RESOLVED ISSUES
February 26, 2026
Resolved an issue where the Commander's Soul Box claimed from the Genesis Pass granted a Commander's Soul with an expired duration.
For players that experienced this issue, a Commander's Soul with its duration extended can be claimed via the Gift Drop system.
Resolved an issue where applying the Plasma Heart Upgrade Module to a heart with Item Guard active would cause the heart to be permanently untradable.
Resolved an issue where occasionally Expeditions would not be displayed in the Mystic Frontier section of the Familiar UI.
Resolved an issue where after completing the 'End of Special Training' quest, Resistance characters would not obtain the Hero's Echo skill.
Resolved an issue where players in a 2-person party were unable to challenge the Lotus boss fight on Genesis difficulty.
Resolved an issue where the 'NLM Guardians Token Shop' guide displayed the incorrect reset time.
February 18, 2026
Resolved an issue where selecting a Hair Choice Coupon from the Beauty tab in the Cash Shop would open a purchase window for the Boss Hair Coupon instead.
For players who intended to purchase the Hair Choice Coupon but received a Boss Hair Coupon due to this issue, please contact Player Support for a refund and the Boss Hair Coupon will also be removed.
February 12, 2026
Resolved an issue where entering Champion Raid via the Legion UI while Familiars are summoned would cause the client to disconnect.
Resolved an issue where the Commander's Soul Box could not be opened.
Resolved an issue where trying to purchase a Plasma Heart Upgrade Module while your inventory was full would cause the purchase limit to decrease without providing the item or deducting Advanced NLM Tokens.
Resolved an issue where Fusing Familiars were not being updated correctly after the Fusion animation.
Resolved an issue where Mo Xuan characters could sometimes obtain STR-based rings from the White Jade Ring Box.
Resolved an issue where missing an attack with the Discount Coupon Damage Skin (Unit), Receipt Damage Skin (Unit), or the Bargain Sale Damage Skin would cause the client to crash.
Resolved an issue where multiple of the same Familiar badge could be equipped in a Familiar Badge Preset.
Resolved a text issue with the Food Court UI in the 'New Leaf Mall' event.
Resolved an issue where the tooltip while hovering over the Skin Selector Coupon in the NLM Meso Shop incorrectly listed the Hessonite Skin Coupon as an option.
Resolved an issue where Kanna's Secondary Weapon did not appear when you click the 'View the entire Item list' option for some AbsoLab and Arcane Umbra Weapon Boxes.
Resolved an issue where the skill sound effects from the Victoria's Adventure mini-game did not play.
Resolved an issue where the Lv. 50 Fan of Enlightment was being sold in the Arachno and Phantasma Coin Shops.
Resolved an issue where Kanna characters would lose their Gauge during the Lotus Phase 1 boss fight.
Resolved an issue where the Alliance of the Dawn Damage Skin was displayed incorrectly when viewed in the Damage Skins UI.
Resolved an issue where disconnecting during the Kanna Character Story Summary cutscene would cause the character to remain at Lv.1.
Resolved an issue where Kanna and Hayato characters were missing the Hero's Echo skill.
Resolved an issue where Zero's Chrono Break skill was displayed as Kanna's [Spirit] Hakumenkonmou Juubi skill in the V Matrix UI.
Resolved a text issue where the dialogue of the Tengu was incorrect when using Kanna's Commune Skill.
February 5, 2026
Resolved an issue where the EXP obtained upon exiting Monster Park buff from Herb Basket was not being applied.
Resolved an issue where players were unable to leave the Planet Twent map.
Resolved an issue where players in Heroic and Challenger-Heroic Worlds were unable to retrieve or store items in the Storage Room. Any items expired within the storage while storage was unavailable will be redistributed once the investigation is complete.
Resolved an issue where the Familiar UI incorrectly displayed only the default 100 slots for players with expanded slots.
Resolved an issue where Familiars were lost after world leaping from Challenger Worlds.
Resolved an issue where Gollux's Abdomen, Shoulder, and Face were not spawning.
Resolved an issue where the date listed in the '[Kanna] Secondary Weapon Conversion Available' quest was displayed incorrectly.
Resolved an issue where the text shown when changing channels in the Victoria Adventure event was displayed in Korean.
Resolved an issue where players are sometimes unable to access the Party UIs during the Victoria Adventure event.
Resolved an issue where some Hayato skill names are displayed incorrectly.
Resolved an issue where untranslated text appeared in the New Leaf Mall Meso Shop, Stamp Shop, Coin Shop, and Token Shop UIs.
Resolved an issue where exclusive skills were not displayed when equipping Genesis or Destiny Weapons on Kanna.
Resolved an issue where untranslated text appeared in the New Leaf Mall Food Court UI.
Resolved an issue where party matching would sometimes fail in Victoria Adventure.
Resolved an issue where Lynn's 'Peck' skill would sometimes not attack enemies.
Resolved an issue where the client would sometimes disconnect when viewing another player's character information.
Resolved an issue where Food and Drink Coupons could not be purchased.
Resolved an issue where Sia Astelle's Algol summon had awkward movement.
February 4, 2026
Resolved an issue where players were unable to complete the '[Tera Blink] Unlock Your Hidden Potential!' quest.
items.bodyZh:
**维护公告**
**2026年2月26日**
**V.266 版本已知问题**

“已知问题”部分主要关注对游戏和社区造成重大影响，且我们团队正在积极处理的主要问题。请注意，虽然我们力求涵盖影响最大的问题，但此列表不会包含所有已报告的问题。请定期查看此处，以获取这些问题状态的更新、已解决问题的信息，或可能新增的问题。

以下是 v.266 版本《战国武士觉醒》更新中的已知问题与已解决问题列表：

**已知问题**
*   [更新于2月21日] 互动世界的独角兽魔方销售已暂时禁用。对此造成的不便，我们深表歉意。
*   [更新于2月21日] 我们已确认独角兽魔方功能正常，互动世界的独角兽魔方销售现已重新启用。再次为造成的不便致歉，并感谢您的耐心。

**已解决问题**
**2026年2月26日**
*   修复了从创世通行证中领取的“指挥官灵魂箱子”会给予一个持续时间已过期的指挥官灵魂的问题。
    *   对于遇到此问题的玩家，可通过礼物箱系统领取一个持续时间已延长的指挥官灵魂。
*   修复了对启用了物品保护的心之容器使用等离子之心升级模块，会导致该心之容器永久无法交易的问题。
*   修复了偶尔在灵兽UI的“神秘边境”部分不显示远征的问题。
*   修复了完成“特别训练的结束”任务后，反抗者角色无法获得“英雄的回响”技能的问题。
*   修复了2人队伍无法挑战创世难度路西德战斗的问题。
*   修复了“NLM守护者代币商店”指南显示的重置时间不正确的问题。

**2026年2月18日**
*   修复了在现金商店的“美容”标签页中选择发型选择券时，会错误地打开BOSS发型券购买窗口的问题。
    *   对于因该问题本想购买发型选择券却获得了BOSS发型券的玩家，请联系玩家支持以获取退款，同时BOSS发型券也将被移除。

**2026年2月12日**
*   修复了在召唤灵兽时通过联盟UI进入冠军副本会导致客户端断开连接的问题。
*   修复了无法打开指挥官灵魂箱子的问题。
*   修复了当背包已满时尝试购买等离子之心升级模块，会导致购买次数减少但未提供物品也未扣除高级NLM代币的问题。
*   修复了灵兽融合后，融合结果未正确更新的问题。
*   修复了墨玄角色有时可能从白玉戒指箱中获得力量（STR）属性戒指的问题。
*   修复了使用折扣券伤害皮肤（单位）、收据伤害皮肤（单位）或特卖伤害皮肤时，若攻击未命中会导致客户端崩溃的问题。
*   修复了在灵兽徽章预设中可以装备多个相同灵兽徽章的问题。
*   修复了“新叶商城”活动中美食广场UI的文本问题。
*   修复了在NLM金币商店中悬停在皮肤选择券上时，其工具提示错误地将红榴石皮肤券列为可选项目的问题。
*   修复了点击部分阿卡夏与奥秘武器箱的“查看全部物品列表”选项时，阴阳师的副武器不显示的问题。
*   修复了维多利亚冒险小游戏中技能音效不播放的问题。
*   修复了阿拉赫诺与幻影币商店中错误地出售了Lv.50 启明之扇的问题。
*   修复了阴阳师角色在路西德第一阶段战斗中会丢失能量槽的问题。
*   修复了黎明联盟伤害皮肤在伤害皮肤UI中显示不正确的问题。
*   修复了在阴阳师角色故事概要过场动画中断开连接，会导致角色停留在Lv.1的问题。
*   修复了阴阳师和剑豪角色缺失“英雄的回响”技能的问题。
*   修复了在V矩阵UI中，零的“时空断裂”技能被显示为阴阳师的【灵】白面金毛九尾技能的问题。
*   修复了使用阴阳师的“通灵”技能时，天狗对话文本不正确的问题。

**2026年2月5日**
*   修复了退出怪物公园时，来自草药篮的“怪物公园经验值获得”增益效果未应用的问题。
*   修复了玩家无法离开特温特星地图的问题。
*   修复了英雄世界与挑战者-英雄世界的玩家无法在仓库中存取物品的问题。在仓库不可用期间，仓库内任何过期的物品将在调查完成后重新发放。
*   修复了灵兽UI错误地仅为拥有扩展槽位的玩家显示默认的100个槽位的问题。
*   修复了从挑战者世界进行世界跳跃后灵兽丢失的问题。
*   修复了古瓦洛的腹部、肩部和脸部不生成的问题。
*   修复了“[阴阳师] 副武器转换可用”任务中列出的日期显示不正确的问题。
*   修复了维多利亚冒险活动中切换频道时显示的文本为韩文的问题。
*   修复了在维多利亚冒险活动中，玩家有时无法访问组队UI的问题。
*   修复了部分剑豪技能名称显示不正确的问题。
*   修复了新叶商城的金币商店、印花商店、硬币商店和代币商店UI中出现未翻译文本的问题。
*   修复了阴阳师装备创世或命运武器时，专属技能不显示的问题。
*   修复了新叶商城美食广场UI中出现未翻译文本的问题。
*   修复了维多利亚冒险中组队匹配有时会失败的问题。
*   修复了林之灵的“啄击”技能有时不攻击敌人的问题。
*   修复了查看其他玩家角色信息时，客户端有时会断开连接的问题。
*   修复了无法购买食物和饮料券的问题。
*   修复了希娅·艾丝黛儿的“阿尔戈尔”召唤物移动不自然的问题。

**2026年2月4日**
*   修复了玩家无法完成“[泰拉闪烁] 解锁你的隐藏潜力！”任务的问题。
